mapper.select: SELECT sms_id, phone, sms_type, content, code, send_status, send_time, expire_time, create_time FROM sms_record WHERE sms_id = #{smsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sms_record (phone, sms_type, content, code, send_status, send_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{phone}, #{smsType}, #{content}, #{code}, #{sendStatus}, #{sendTime}, #{expireTime})
